NPS_Unit.UnitCode: MANDATORY for Data Store: NPS Alpha Unit Code (ACAD)
NPS_Unit.UnitType: MANDATORY for Data Store: NPS Unit Type (National Park, National Monument, etc)

lineage.Process: Append 'E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS' "E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\AWS_VTP_PROD_GISDATA.sde\GISDATA.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS" NO_TEST "SOURCE_ID "SOURCE_ID" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,SOURCE_ID,0,14;PWS_NAME "PWS_NAME" true true false 40 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,PWS_NAME,0,39;S_NAME "S_NAME" true true false 40 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,S_NAME,0,39;PWS_STATUS "PWS_STATUS" true true false 1 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,PWS_STATUS,0,0;S_STATUS "S_STATUS" true true false 1 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,S_STATUS,0,0;PWS_CLASS "PWS_CLASS" true true false 6 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,PWS_CLASS,0,5;S_AVAILABI "S_AVAILABI" true true false 6 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,S_AVAILABI,0,5" # # # NOT_UPDATE_GEOMETRY NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

Append 'E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS' "E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\AWS_VTP_PROD_GISDATA.sde\GISDATA.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS" NO_TEST "SOURCE_ID "SOURCE_ID" true true false 15 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,SOURCE_ID,0,14;PWS_NAME "PWS_NAME" true true false 40 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,PWS_NAME,0,39;S_NAME "S_NAME" true true false 40 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,S_NAME,0,39;PWS_STATUS "PWS_STATUS" true true false 1 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,PWS_STATUS,0,0;S_STATUS "S_STATUS" true true false 1 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,S_STATUS,0,0;PWS_CLASS "PWS_CLASS" true true false 6 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,PWS_CLASS,0,5;S_AVAILABI "S_AVAILABI" true true false 6 Text 0 0,First,#,E:\MassGIS\dvaladas\DB Connections\GISA002_MASSGIS.sde\DEP.PWSDEP_PT_WQTS,S_AVAILABI,0,5" # # # NOT_UPDATE_GEOMETRY NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS USE_FEATURE_SERVICE_MODE

idCitation.resTitle: DEP Public Water Supplies WQTS Table

dataIdInfo.idAbs: The PWSDEP_PT_WQTS table contains information downloaded from the MassDEP Water Quality Testing System (WQTS) database at the time of update. WQTS is DEP's comprehensive repository for PWS information. Please note that the WQTS database contains many other data items that are not contained in the PWSDEP_PT_WQTS. Only sources coded in WQTS as having Active (ACTIVE), Inactive (INACT) or Emergency (EMERG) availability (see: S_AVAILABI field) are maintained in PWS_DEP. As stated in 310 CMR 22.02: An Active Source means an approved source(s) used for primary or backup purposes to meet consumer demands as necessary. An Inactive source means an approved source(s) which is expected to be off-line for at least one year (12 months). A source may be deemed inactive only upon written approval of the Department. An Emergency source means any source of water used to supplement or temporarily replace a public water system's active or inactive source(s) when water of sufficient quality or quantity is not available. Sources listed as abandoned (ABAND) in WQTS are removed from the PWS datalayer. Sources in WQTS that are coded as abandoned include both abandoned and decommissioned wells. Abandoned sources are no longer in use or are otherwise unfit for the purposes of water supply. Abandoned sources have been physically disconnected from the distribution system but have not undergone DEP's formal decommissioning process. Decommissioning requires physically rendering the source incapable of water supply delivery.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: Related attribute table for DEP Public Water Supply (PWS) source datalayer (PWSDEP_PT)

LegConsts.useLimit: See access and use constraints information.

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: ArcGIS 10.2 Enterprise Geodatabase/Oracle 12c Enterprise Edition Release 12.1.0.2.0 - 64bit

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
